entries.round: task:Execute Phase 3 tasks from tasks.md: Polymarket CLOB WebSocket & Whale Tracker. 1. Create 'services/clob_listener.py' using 'websockets' to connect to Polymarket CLOB (wss://ws-subscriptions-clob.polymarket.com/ws/market). 2. Subscribe to 'condition_ids' of active 'tracked_events' from MongoDB. 3. Parse Trade messages ('T'), filter for size > 0,000 (ape in). 4. Create 'services/polygonscan.py' with caching to query the maker's wallet tx_count. 5. Send the 🟢 BUY / 🔴 SELL alert via aiogram. 6. Start the CLOB listener in main.py. Use <write_file> tags.
